# Trust Layer for Inclusive Fintech Application Packet

Version: `1.0.0`
Category: Accion Trust by Design Fintech Challenge / student_partner_track
Deadline: 2026-06-05 23:59 EDT
Production readiness: 100%

## Application Thesis

Trust Layer for Inclusive Fintech turns opportunity discovery, rule reading, evidence collection, demo packaging, and external submissions into AI-native startup operations.

## Eligibility Gates

- partner_required: Submission must be made by an eligible in-market fintech or financial-services partner. Evidence: `docs/partner_fintech_required.md`.
- partner_required: Solution must be live with active customers at submission time. Evidence: `docs/eligibility_checklist.md`.
- done: Trust layer MVP covers transparency, fraud prompts, consent, complaint resolution, and harm mitigation. Evidence: `docs/trust_layer_mvp.md`.
- done: Gender-disaggregated metric schema and reporting outputs are ready for partner data. Evidence: `docs/gender_disaggregated_metrics.md`.
- done: All 42 application-guide questions are mapped to draft answers and partner input fields. Evidence: `application/application_draft.md`.
- ready_for_authorized_session: WAIBAv dry-run and authorized final-submit playbook are prepared with a legal authority gate. Evidence: `automation/waiba/accion_submission_dry_run.playbook.yml`.

## Milestones

- 0.1.0: Official requirements and form inventory (2026-05-30, done).
- 0.3.0: Partner-fintech gates and outreach packet (2026-05-30, done).
- 0.6.0: V trust engine and metric validation (2026-05-30, done).
- 0.8.0: Vue reporting demo and submission packet (2026-05-30, done).
- 1.0.0: Application-ready package with automation receipts (2026-05-30, done).
